fn process_large_file(content: &str) -> usize {
    let mut count = 0;
    for line in content.split('\n') {
        if line.contains("error") {
            count += 1;
        }
    }
    count
}

fn find_matching_lines(content: &str, needle: &str) -> Vec<&str> {
    content.split('\n')
        .filter(|l| l.contains(needle))
        .collect()
}
